data.body: When users sync knots across builds, workflow mismatches can cause failures. Design a system where workflows are bound to a repo so that pulling updates also installs/upgrades the required workflows automatically. Key questions: (1) Where should workflow definitions live in the repo? (2) How should version conflicts be resolved? (3) What happens when a user has local customizations to a workflow? (4) Should workflows be tied to the knots branch or the main branch?
data.title: Design repo-bound workflow distribution
